phase: Phase 5 — Function Classification and Unified Source Tree COMPLETE

main_dol.notes: Limited by DOL sparse memory layout. Phase 3 capstone output (1000+ functions) still primary.

staticr_rel.notes: Full decompilation complete. Output in data/ghidra_staticr/ (48MB, too large for git).

phase5_classification.notes: Most known symbols (from snailspeed3) reference addresses above 0x80780000, which is outside the Ghidra-decompiled range (0x80400000-0x80780000). Classification relies primarily on address range analysis.

next_steps: Phase 6: Module reconstruction — clean up generated names, resolve cross-references
Expand known symbol coverage by analyzing functions above 0x80780000
Cross-reference decompiled main.dol functions with StaticR functions
Begin type recovery for key classes (Player, KartDynamics, Racedata)
